text: Entering this space, I am filled with curiosity and a sense of anticipation. The modern, transparent walls invite openness, while the bold "R + D" sign and interactive displays evoke the spirit of inquiry. The setting prompts me to reflect on progress and our continuous pursuit of understanding, especially regarding the evolving relationship between humans and machines. Here, the convergence of logic, art, and discovery feels tangible—a place for questioning and wonder.
